_help: Feishu (Lark) bot config. Copy to feishu.json and fill in.
3. Event Subscriptions: choose 'Use long connection to receive events'
- App ID and App Secret: Credentials & Basic Info page (starts with cli_)
- Send a message to the bot first, then check the agent's feishu inbox
Leave allowed_users empty/null to accept messages from all users.
